creator: avatar@mmlab.cse.yzu.edu.tw
text:
upgrade port chinese/pine4 from 4.21 to 4.30
	pine 4.30 includes some important security fixes:

		http://www.washington.edu/pine/changes/4.21-to-4.30.html

	Changed files:
		Makefile			maintainer email address
						honor PREFIX setting
		pkg-descr			remove unnecessary banners
		files/dot.pinerc.pgp.sample	honor PREFIX setting
		files/dot.pinerc.sample		honor PREFIX setting
						use default Chinese charset
		files/pgpdecode			honor PREFIX setting
		files/pgpencrypt		honor PREFIX setting
		files/pgpsign			honor PREFIX setting
		files/pine.conf			use default Chinese charset
		files/patch-XX			line shift

	Removed files:
		files/patch-bz			the bug seems fixed in 4.30

How-To-Repeat: 
	Please check and commit the patch presented in "Fix" section, thanks.
